chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 22 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of bail application 25.02.2026 Mr. Aqleem Hyder Shar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant requires the bail application to be disposed of as not pressed. Ordered accordingly. Matter stands disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
